title: Lines Written In An Album Of Miss Patty More�s, Sister Of Hannah More.
content:
In vain to live from age to age
    While modern bards endeavour,
    I write my name in Patty�s page,
    And gain my point for ever.
meaning:
This evocative piece by William Cowper, titled "Lines Written In An Album Of Miss Patty More�s, Sister Of Hannah More.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
